subparts.text: How Solenoid valve is used for operation of any pneumatic actuator?
Explain briefly the circuit of D and T flip-flops using JK flip-flop
What is meant by Memory Address wit reference to Microprocessor?
How displacement is sensed by LVDT.
Distinguish between physical and mathematical model.
Analyze any industrial robot & identify the different Mechatronics elements?

questions.question_text: Bulk lose material is to be emptied from a dump hopper , by pressing a press button P1 ,the dump hopper is tilted and bulk lose material tilted out, by pressing a another press button P2 ,the dump hopper is returned to its initial position. Design a pneumatic circuit for operation & describe the components used in the circuit. Figure-1
Design a pneumatic valve circuit to give the sequence A+, followed by B+ and then simultaneously followed by A- and B-. 2
Minimize the following switching function by K- map and implement it by NAND gate only. F =Σ + Σ dc
What is a load cell? Draw the schematic diagram of a strain gauge based load cell. Discuss the principle of operation.

As a Mechatronic designer moves progressively from an 8-bit to 10-bit to 12-bit A/D converter. Comment on the feasibility of design & Discuss what problems might be incurred in the design of the data acquisition system?
Distinguish between inverting and non-inverting amplifiers also derive the gain equation for a non-inverting amplifier.
Explain the working of a PLC by drawing its basic architecture. Also draw the ladder rungs to represent the two switches are normally open and both have to be closed for a motor to operate.
Describe for any two of the following systems, giving free hand sketch, list of components & justification as Mechatronics Product. i) Printer ii) Bar Code Reader iii) Domestic Washing Machine
